title: scopolia parviflora f. lutescens
intro: Scopolia parviflora f. lutescens, also known as a yellow-flowered variety of the Scopolia plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant contains tropane alkaloids, such as scopolamine, which have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including analgesic, antispasmodic, and anticholinergic effects. The health benefits of Scopolia parviflora f. lutescens include its potential to treat conditions such as insomnia, muscle spasms, and irritable bowel syndrome, as well as its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. The herbal preparations of Scopolia parviflora f. lutescens include dried roots, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
